title: Certificates/Forms Assistance * Transgender Individuals - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Certificates/Forms Assistance * Transgender Individuals 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Disabilities Issues Immigration Issues Transgender Individuals Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OUTSIDE IN ID PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with changing name/gender through the courts or at the DMV (cannot do both for one person). Services range from providing information on the process of changing documents in the state of Oregon to offering financial aid and advocacy at the courts and the DMV. The level of financial assistance and eligibility for this assistance varies based on program's budget. 1132 SW 13th Avenue Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: People who identify as transgender or gender-nonconforming Hours: By appointment only Email (503) 535-3828 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OUTSIDE IN ID PROJECT
